subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of grandeur! The winds have grown fierce and the tempests of tribulation have arisen, and the ships are shattered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بذیل الکبریاء قد اشتدت الاریاح و هاجت عواصف البلاء و تکسرت سفن
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
